news.title:
MTNL shares surged 10% as the government monetised assets worth Rs 10,000 crore, including Rs 7,000 crore from MTNL.
Proceeds aim to reduce MTNL's Rs 33,568 crore debt, with future monetisation targets set to boost financial health.
news.summary:
MTNL shares surged 10% as the government monetised assets worth Rs 10,000 crore, including Rs 7,000 crore from MTNL.
Proceeds aim to reduce MTNL's Rs 33,568 crore debt, with future monetisation targets set to boost financial health.

news.title:
MTNL gets ₹10,000 crore worth of assets released by the government.
The move marks a significant development for MTNL, as per NDTV Profit.
news.summary:
MTNL gets ₹10,000 crore worth of assets released by the government.
The move marks a significant development for MTNL, as per NDTV Profit.

news.title:
Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd surged 14.6% from Rs. 25.68 to Rs. 29.44 in a week.
The gain outpaced Sensex's 5.3% rise, despite a Strong Sell rating by MarketsMojo.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd surged 14.6% from Rs. 25.68 to Rs. 29.44 in a week.
The gain outpaced Sensex's 5.3% rise, despite a Strong Sell rating by MarketsMojo.

news.title:
MTNL funded the escrow account in Bank of India for 11th semi-annual interest payment of MTNL Bond Series V.
Payment of 7.05% interest on bond series INE153A08089, due 12 April 2026, was funded on 8 April 2026.
news.summary:
MTNL funded the escrow account in Bank of India for 11th semi-annual interest payment of MTNL Bond Series V.
Payment of 7.05% interest on bond series INE153A08089, due 12 April 2026, was funded on 8 April 2026.

news.title:
MTNL missed funding escrow for 7.05% bonds due Apr 2026 due to insufficient funds.
The bonds are sovereign guaranteed by the Government of India.
news.summary:
MTNL missed funding escrow for 7.05% bonds due Apr 2026 due to insufficient funds.
The bonds are sovereign guaranteed by the Government of India.

news.title:
Mahanagar Telephone Nigam executed a lease property transfer deed with NABARD.
MTNL received ₹3.51 billion as consideration for the property transfer.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Telephone Nigam executed a lease property transfer deed with NABARD.
MTNL received ₹3.51 billion as consideration for the property transfer.

news.title:
MTNL sold leasehold rights of Mumbai property to NABARD for ₹350.7 crore.
The property includes 28 quarters on a 2680 sqm plot with 4021.4 sqm built-up area.
news.summary:
MTNL sold leasehold rights of Mumbai property to NABARD for ₹350.7 crore.
The property includes 28 quarters on a 2680 sqm plot with 4021.4 sqm built-up area.

news.title:
MTNL signs agreement with Bihar Govt to transfer lease rights of 7 properties worth ₹68.4 Cr.
Govt has fully paid; agreement valid for 6 months or until transfer completion.
news.summary:
MTNL signs agreement with Bihar Govt to transfer lease rights of 7 properties worth ₹68.4 Cr.
Govt has fully paid; agreement valid for 6 months or until transfer completion.

news.title:
MTNL informs SEBI compliance for funding semi-annual interest in escrow account.
Interest payment for MTNL Bond Series VII-E funded on March 21, 2026.
news.summary:
MTNL informs SEBI compliance for funding semi-annual interest in escrow account.
Interest payment for MTNL Bond Series VII-E funded on March 21, 2026.

news.title:
MTNL discloses default on principal and interest payments totaling INR 9,188 Cr.
Total financial indebtedness of MTNL stands at INR 36,216 Cr, including loans and bonds.
news.summary:
MTNL discloses default on principal and interest payments totaling INR 9,188 Cr.
Total financial indebtedness of MTNL stands at INR 36,216 Cr, including loans and bonds.

news.title:
MTNL's 6th semi-annual interest payment on 7.75 bonds due 24 Mar 2026; escrow funding delayed.
Bonds are sovereign-guaranteed by Govt. of India; guarantee can be invoked if default occurs.
news.summary:
MTNL's 6th semi-annual interest payment on 7.75 bonds due 24 Mar 2026; escrow funding delayed.
Bonds are sovereign-guaranteed by Govt. of India; guarantee can be invoked if default occurs.

news.title:
MTNL recorded the poorest performance in TRAI's Jan network test in Mumbai.
The test assessed mobile network performance in urban, crowded, and transport areas.
news.summary:
MTNL recorded the poorest performance in TRAI's Jan network test in Mumbai.
The test assessed mobile network performance in urban, crowded, and transport areas.

news.title:
MTNL funds escrow for 7.51% interest on Bonds VIIID, due 6 March 2026.
Funding executed via Bank of India on 4 March 2026.
news.summary:
MTNL funds escrow for 7.51% interest on Bonds VIIID, due 6 March 2026.
Funding executed via Bank of India on 4 March 2026.

news.title:
MTNL faces fines of Rs. 5.4L by NSE and BSE for board composition non-compliance under SEBI LODR.
MTNL seeks waiver, citing appointments by DoT; financial operations remain unaffected by fines.
news.summary:
MTNL faces fines of Rs. 5.4L by NSE and BSE for board composition non-compliance under SEBI LODR.
MTNL seeks waiver, citing appointments by DoT; financial operations remain unaffected by fines.

news.title:
MTNL's bonds and NCDs retain Crisil AAA(CE) rating, on watch negative since Sept 2024.
Rating reflects government guarantee, trustee support; monitoring payment adherence continues.
news.summary:
MTNL's bonds and NCDs retain Crisil AAA(CE) rating, on watch negative since Sept 2024.
Rating reflects government guarantee, trustee support; monitoring payment adherence continues.

news.title:
Mahanagar Telephone Nigam cannot pay interest for Bond Series VIIID due March 6, 2026, due to insufficient escrow funds.
A default on this payment will activate the government's sovereign guarantee.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Telephone Nigam cannot pay interest for Bond Series VIIID due March 6, 2026, due to insufficient escrow funds.
A default on this payment will activate the government's sovereign guarantee.

news.title:
MTNL funds escrow account for 5th semi-annual bond interest at 7.6%.
Payment due on 24 Feb 2026, funded on 21 Feb 2026 via BoI escrow.
news.summary:
MTNL funds escrow account for 5th semi-annual bond interest at 7.6%.
Payment due on 24 Feb 2026, funded on 21 Feb 2026 via BoI escrow.

news.title:
MTNL fined Rs 7 lakh by TRAI for QoS violations in Aug 2025.
Violations include Call Set up Success Rate and geospatial map issues.
news.summary:
MTNL fined Rs 7 lakh by TRAI for QoS violations in Aug 2025.
Violations include Call Set up Success Rate and geospatial map issues.

news.title:
India Ratings maintained MTNL's NCDs at IND AAA CE on Rating Watch Negative due to GoI payment delays.
No interest payment delays occurred as liquidity was supported by GoI guarantee and trustee monitoring.
news.summary:
India Ratings maintained MTNL's NCDs at IND AAA CE on Rating Watch Negative due to GoI payment delays.
No interest payment delays occurred as liquidity was supported by GoI guarantee and trustee monitoring.

news.title:
MTNL failed to fund the escrow account for its 5th semi-annual interest payment on Bond Series VIIIB.
Despite insufficient funds, Sovereign Guarantee ensures Government of India will cover defaults under the tripartite agreement.
news.summary:
MTNL failed to fund the escrow account for its 5th semi-annual interest payment on Bond Series VIIIB.
Despite insufficient funds, Sovereign Guarantee ensures Government of India will cover defaults under the tripartite agreement.
